root_text.sn37.29:1.4: Rūpabalena ca, bhikkhave, mātugāmo samannāgato hoti, na ca bhogabalena—
root_text.sn37.29:1.6: Yato ca kho, bhikkhave, mātugāmo rūpabalena ca samannāgato hoti, bhogabalena ca—
root_text.sn37.29:1.8: Rūpabalena ca, bhikkhave, mātugāmo samannāgato hoti, bhogabalena ca, na ca ñātibalena—
root_text.sn37.29:1.10: Yato ca kho, bhikkhave, mātugāmo rūpabalena ca samannāgato hoti, bhogabalena ca, ñātibalena ca—
root_text.sn37.29:1.12: Rūpabalena ca, bhikkhave, mātugāmo samannāgato hoti, bhogabalena ca, ñātibalena ca, na ca puttabalena—
root_text.sn37.29:1.14: Yato ca kho, bhikkhave, mātugāmo rūpabalena ca samannāgato hoti, bhogabalena ca, ñātibalena ca, puttabalena ca—
root_text.sn37.29:1.16: Rūpabalena ca, bhikkhave, mātugāmo samannāgato hoti, bhogabalena ca, ñātibalena ca, puttabalena ca, na ca sīlabalena—
root_text.sn37.29:1.18: Yato ca kho, bhikkhave, mātugāmo rūpabalena ca samannāgato hoti, bhogabalena ca, ñātibalena ca, puttabalena ca, sīlabalena ca—
root_text.sn37.29:1.20: Imāni kho, bhikkhave, pañca mātugāmassa balānī”ti.

translation_text.sn37.29:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five powers of a lady.
translation_text.sn37.29:1.3: Attractiveness, wealth, relatives, children, and ethical behavior.
translation_text.sn37.29:1.4: A lady who has the power of attractiveness but not the power of wealth
translation_text.sn37.29:1.6: But when she has the power of attractiveness and the power of wealth
translation_text.sn37.29:1.8: A lady who has the powers of attractiveness and wealth, but not the power of relatives
translation_text.sn37.29:1.10: But when she has the powers of attractiveness, wealth, and relatives
translation_text.sn37.29:1.12: A lady who has the powers of attractiveness, wealth, and relatives, but not the power of children
translation_text.sn37.29:1.14: But when she has the powers of attractiveness, wealth, relatives, and children
translation_text.sn37.29:1.16: A lady who has the powers of attractiveness, wealth, relatives, and children, but not the power of ethical behavior
translation_text.sn37.29:1.18: But when she has the powers of attractiveness, wealth, relatives, children, and ethical behavior
translation_text.sn37.29:1.20: These are the five powers of a lady.”
